15 Temmuz hain darbe girişiminin yıl dönümünde, milletimizin canı pahasına durdurduğu o karanlık yapının geçmişten günümüze uzanan sinsi sızma hikayesi.

Gençlik yıllarından itibaren özel izinlerle vaazlar vererek önü açılan, 1966'da İzmir Kestane Pazarı'nda temelleri atılan bu sinsi örgüt; 1976'da Türkiye Öğretmenler Vakfı'nı kurarak devletin en kritik sınav sorularını çalmaya ve kamu kurumlarına sızmaya başladı.

1980 darbesine açık destek vererek önünü açan, 90'lı yıllarda televizyon kanalları, gazeteler ve bankalarla devasa bir finans ağı kuran yapı; 1998'de Vatikan'da Papa ile görüşerek "Dinlerarası Diyalog" maskesi arkasına saklandı. 28 Şubat postmodern darbesini alkışlayan ve adım adım devletin tüm kademelerini ele geçiren bu karanlık şebeke, en sonunda 15 Temmuz gecesi asıl yüzünü gösterdi. Milletimizin kahramanca direnişiyle yerle bir olan bu sinsi ihanet ağını asla unutmayacağız!

#15Temmuz #MilliBirlikGünü #FETÖ

Filmdə əsas rolları Hacı İsmayılov, Şəfiqə Məmmədova, David Uplisaşvili, Şükufə Yusupova, E.Qasımov, Sədayə Mustafayeva, Hüseynağa Sadıqov, Fuad Poladov, Ağahüseyn Kərimov və Rafiq Əzimov ifa edirlər.

Bu gün, 1 iyun  Uşaqların Beynəlxalq Müdafiəsi Günüdür
"Bizim Cəbiş müəllim" filminin "Makedon" obrazı ilə tanınan aktyoru Aqil Ağacanov 77 yaşında dünyasını dəyişdi. Məkanı cənnət olsun!

28 May - Müstəqillik Günüdür 🇦🇿
Bu tarix, 1918-ci il 28 mayda Azərbaycan Xalq Cümhuriyyətinin yaradılması və İstiqlal Bəyannaməsinin qəbulu ilə bağlıdır. Həmin gün Azərbaycan müsəlman Şərqində ilk parlamentli demokratik respublika elan edilmişdi.
Azərbaycan Xalq Cümhuriyyətinin yaradılması və Azərbaycanın müstəqillik tarixində müstəsna rolu olan ən önəmli şəxslər bunlardır:
Məmməd Əmin Rəsulzadə - Azərbaycanın istiqlal ideyasının əsas siması hesab olunur.“Bir kərə yüksələn bayraq, bir daha enməz” sözü ilə tanınır. Milli Şuranın sədri olmuş və istiqlalın elanında aparıcı rol oynayıb.
Fətəli Xan Xoyski - 1918-ci ildə ilk hökuməti formalaşdırıb. Dövlət idarəçiliyinin və hüquqi əsasların qurulmasında böyük xidmət göstərib.
Əlimərdan bəy Topçubaşov - Azərbaycanın beynəlxalq səviyyədə tanınması üçün çalışıb. Paris Sülh Konfransında Azərbaycan nümayəndə heyətinə rəhbərlik edib.
Nəsib bəy Yusifbəyli - Təhsil, dövlət idarəçiliyi və parlament fəaliyyətində mühüm rol oynayıb.
Həsən bəy Ağayev - Parlamentin rəhbərlərindən biri olub və siyasi təşkilatlanmada iştirak edib.
Səməd bəy Mehmandarov və Əliağa Şıxlinski -  milli ordunun yaradılmasına rəhbərlik ediblər.

latestIgtvVideos.caption:
📍Al-Nahda, Dubai 🇦🇪

#Vanchipurra is an authentic #KeralaRestaurant located in Al- Nahda. They have #traincompartment and #houseboat where we can sit and dine-in. #Catching #livefish is one of the best highlights here that you must not miss out. It had great ambience and good staff was a worth visiting.

STARTERS

🔯 Kairali Chicken Fry

Rating - ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

#Chicken Marinated and deep fried chicken cooked in dry and tomato sauce was very crispy and tasty. Must Try !
 
🔯 Fish Fry

Rating - ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

Freshly prepared fish with the right amount of spices was mouth-watering. This was caught live from the restaurant itself !
 
🍱 MAINS 🍱

🔯 Paneer Butter Masala

Rating - ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

#Paneerbuttermasala is rich and creamy made of butter, #paneer , onions, tomatoes, cashew and spice powders, and herb was #flavorful.

🔯 Chicken Verattharacchathu

Rating - ⭐⭐⭐⭐

#ChickenVerattharacchathu  was having right amount of spices. The #chicken pieces were succulent and were tasty.

🔯 Kappa Chicken biryani

Rating - ⭐⭐⭐⭐

Chicken #KappaBiryani Recipe is an authentic dish that is most loved dish from kerala which is made from mashed fresh #tapioca sauteed along with minced chicken and Indian spice. 

🔯 Kizhi Parotta Beef

Rating - ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

#Kizhiporotta was so yummy, tasty and a Variety dish which look like Kizhi, in a steamed #bananaleaf #porotta mixed in a #Beefcurry. The blend of porotta & beef curry is classic !

🍧DESSERTS 🍧

🔯 Malai Kulfi

Rating - ⭐⭐⭐⭐

#Kulfi served on #matka which after a very satisfying cuisine is the best way to end the experience on a higher note !

DRINKS

🔯 Avocado Juice/Watermelon Juice/Kulukki Sharbat

Rating - ⭐⭐⭐⭐

The drinks served were very cold,tasty and refreshing.

Stepping into @kimptonbamboogrovesuzhou felt like stepping into another era of Suzhou 🤍🎍

Originally known as The Bamboo Grove Hotel, the property has been beautifully renewed into a Kimpton while preserving its rich history and traditional architecture. It perfectly blends Suzhou’s heritage with Kimpton’s modern style, making it such a unique place to stay.

Loved Kimpton’s complimentary Social Hour, a fun way to unwind and meet other guests before heading out for the evening.

One of the highlights was dinner at The Grove, where I got to try their new summer menu. It’s no surprise the restaurant has earned a Black Pearl One Diamond rating. Every dish was beautifully presented and full of flavor. ✨

Later that night, I stopped by Bar 168 to relax and tried the Dream of the Red Chamber cocktail set. It was beautifully crafted, creative, and the perfect way to end the day. 🍸

If you’re traveling with your furry friend, you’ll love that this is also a pet friendly hotel, so your pup gets to enjoy the stay too. 🐶

Luxury from the moment I checked in 🥰

My stay at @ritzcarltonsuzhou truly made me feel taken care of. The service was exceptional from start to finish, with every staff member going above and beyond to make the experience special. 

One of my favorite perks was having access to the Club Lounge. They offer five dining presentations throughout the day: breakfast, lunch, afternoon tea, dinner, and cocktail hour. 🥹 Whether you wanted a full meal or just a place to relax with a drink, the lounge always had something waiting. It honestly made the stay feel even more luxurious.

The room was elegant, peaceful, and exactly what you’d expect from The Ritz-Carlton. Every detail reflected luxury and comfort, making it so easy to relax after exploring Suzhou.

A heartfelt thank you to @ritzcarltonsuzhou for the kind invitation and incredible hospitality. I truly felt spoiled from beginning to end and can’t wait to visit again.

A perfect stay in the heart of Shanghai 

One of my favorite things about @editionshanghai was the location. Just steps away from The Bund, it made exploring Shanghai so easy while still feeling like a peaceful escape from the busy city.

I stayed in the Pearl TV Tower View Room, and waking up to that iconic skyline every morning honestly never got old. 

The dining experiences were just as memorable. I enjoyed a delicious dinner at @yoneshanghai 🍣, ended the evening with cocktails and incredible city views at ROOF 🍸, and started the next morning with breakfast at @shanghai.tavern, a Michelin Selected restaurant. Every meal was thoughtfully prepared and made the stay even more special.

A heartfelt thank you to @editionshanghai for the kind invitation and warm hospitality. I’m so grateful to have experienced such a beautiful property and all of its incredible dining experiences. I truly enjoyed every moment of my stay and hope to be back again someday. 🤍

Waking up to the Oriental Pearl Tower right outside my window 🥰

My stay at @wshanghai came with some of the best views in the city. Whether I was enjoying breakfast in the room, relaxing by the pool, or simply looking out the window, the Shanghai skyline was always putting on a show 

I also loved the little details throughout the stay, especially the in room dumplings and the adorable chopsticks stuffed toy waiting in the room lol Such a cute touch and the perfect Shanghai themed welcome.

The room was stylish, comfortable, and full of fun W touches, making it the perfect home base for exploring Shanghai.

Definitely one of those stays where you find yourself spending extra time in the room just to enjoy the view 🥹
Already thinking about my next Tainan trip 🥺 @shangrilatainan

latestPosts.caption:
A quick 2-day, 1-night getaway to Kaohsiung 🖤

Stayed at @cosmos_otium_voyage and honestly, the location couldn’t be more convenient. There’s a shopping mall right next door, making it super easy to grab food, shop, or just wander around the city.

One of my favorite parts was the in-room breakfast service. It arrived right on time, and I ordered the Local Braised Pork and Kaohsiung-Style Seafood Rice Noodles. Both were absolutely delicious and such a great way to start the day 😋

Another highlight was the complimentary Happy Hour, the perfect excuse to slow down and relax after a day of exploring.

Fun fact: this is Kaohsiung’s container hotel! Despite its unique design, the stay felt incredibly comfortable with Simmons mattresses, Roca bathroom fixtures, and luxurious BVLGARI bath amenities.

A short stay, but definitely one I’ll remember 🥹

Book your next Taiwan getaway with @agodataiwan ✈️🤍

高雄短短的兩天一夜小旅行🖤

這次入住 @cosmos_otium_voyage，地點真的超方便！隔壁就是百貨公司，不管是逛街、吃東西還是採買都非常輕鬆。

最讓我期待的就是客房早餐服務🥹 早餐準時送到房間，完全不用趕著下樓。我點了在地風味滷肉和港都海鮮米粉，兩種都超級好吃，一早就被滿足到😋

另外還有免費 Happy Hour 可以悠閒地喝杯飲料、吃點輕食，真的很加分。

這裡也是高雄相當有特色的貨櫃飯店，全館採用 Simmons 席夢思床墊、Roca 衛浴設備以及寶格麗 BVLGARI 沐浴備品，舒適度完全不輸高級飯店！

雖然只有短短兩天一夜，但已經讓人想再安排下一次高雄旅行了🥹

下次來台灣旅行，別忘了到 @agodataiwan 預訂你的旅程 ✈️ 訂房網頁：https://ago-da.co/voyage-kaohsiung

latestPosts.caption:
Back for my second stay at @shangrilatainan and somehow it was just as amazing as I remembered 🥹

Spent 2 nights here exploring Tainan, and honestly, I wish I could have stayed longer.

One of my favorite parts was definitely breakfast. Not only did they have amazing Asian options, including freshly cooked dishes and Tainan’s famous beef soup, but there was also a great selection of Western breakfast items. I seriously ate way too much every morning 😂

I also loved spending time in the Horizon Club Lounge, which is open from 7:00 AM to 10:00 PM. It’s such a comfortable space to relax throughout the day, with light snacks, drinks, and even the option to make your own cocktails

The room was spotless, cozy, and so comfortable after a full day of exploring Tainan. It felt like the perfect place to come back and relax.

Tainan always has a special charm, and staying here made the trip even better ❤️

Already looking forward to my next visit… and hopefully a longer stay next time 🥹

第二次入住 @shangrilatainan ，沒想到還是和記憶中一樣令人驚艷🥹

這次在台南待了兩個晚上，到處走走逛逛，老實說真的希望可以再多住幾天。

我最喜歡的絕對是早餐！不只有現點現做的熱食和台南必喝的牛肉湯，還有豐富的西式早餐選擇。每天早上都忍不住拿了滿滿一桌，吃得超滿足😂🍳🥐🥩

另外也很喜歡 Horizon Club Lounge，每天早上 7 點到晚上 10 點開放。空間舒適又放鬆，全天都有輕食和飲品供應，還可以自己調製雞尾酒🍸✨ 在外面玩了一整天後，回來坐著放空真的很享受。

房間一如既往地乾淨又舒適，每天回到房間都覺得特別放鬆，完全是旅行中最療癒的時刻之一。

台南一直都有種讓人放慢腳步的魅力，而這次的入住也讓旅程更加完美❤️

已經開始期待下一次再回來了，希望下次可以待久一點🥹

latestPosts.caption:
Fiesta in San Antonio just hits different 🪅

Spent the weekend at @kimptonsantohotel during one of the most exciting times of the year, Fiesta, and the whole property was fully activated. Colorful installations everywhere, festive décor all around, and even a luxury car moment out front. It really felt like the celebration followed you back to the hotel.

Stayed in one of their Historic Suites and wow… easily one of the most unique stays I’ve had. These are restored German schoolhouses from the early 1900s, so every room has its own character. Original architecture, so much charm, it honestly felt like I stepped into history for a weekend.

Dinner at @deanssteakandseafood was sooo good, everything hit, and shoutout to our server Dominick for taking such great care of us 🫶

Next morning we walked right next door to @corinnesatx for breakfast and it was the perfect slow start to the day. Bright, cozy, and the kind of place where everything feels fresh and effortless, exactly what you want after a fun Fiesta night.

And the best part? Everything is right there. Just a quick walk to La Villita, Southtown, and the River Walk, couldn’t have picked a better spot to soak in all the Fiesta energy.

Already want to go back 🥹💛

It’s cherry blossom season 🌸 who is going to Japan？

Shamakhi is widely known for its mountain landscapes, fresh air, and rich cultural heritage. Yet beyond its historical monuments and scenic views, the region offers unique experiences that reveal a completely different side of Azerbaijan. Among various azerbaijan tours, this itinerary stands out thanks to its rare combination of science, wildlife, and nature-based exploration.

During the journey, travelers will visit the famous astrophysical observatory and continue to an exciting Shamakhi safari tour. The program combines educational discovery with unforgettable encounters with animals living in spacious natural habitats. This experience is ideal for those who enjoy authentic destinations, beautiful scenery, and unusual attractions away from busy city routes.

Two caravanserais standing face to face — two cultures connected by the Silk Road.

The Multani Caravanserai welcomed merchants from India, while the Bukhara Caravanserai hosted Muslim travelers from Central Asia. Their different traditions, including food customs, shaped the life of medieval Baku.

Today, these historic buildings remind us that Azerbaijan has been a meeting point of cultures for centuries.

Discover the stories of the Old City with us! ✨

The Khizi-Shahdag Tour is a captivating day trip that explores Azerbaijan’s northern wonders, blending breathtaking landscapes and rich cultural experiences. Take on the road to the northen side of the Land of Fire, explore unique Khizi mountains, try out a number of traditional Azerbaijani dishes, including Qusar specialties. and have the fun of your life at Shahdag Mountain Resort. Shahdag offers both adventure and relaxation in its scenic lodges and leisure spots, ensuring a memorable end to the tour.

The Guba-Khinalig tour is a captivating journey through the European part of Azerbaijan. Traveling along the Caspian Sea and the Samur-Divichinsky lowland, the route leads tourists to the majestic mountains of the North Caucasus. This Azerbaijan mountain village tour takes you to Khinalig, the highest settlement in the country. Khinalig sightseeing experience on this trip is unmatched to any other thing you can come across while engaging in rural Azerbaijan tours.

Azerbaijan Travel International presents one of the most remarkable day trips of a lifetime. Over twelve hours, the Guba-Khinalig tour keeps travelers enthralled, continually revealing new wonders, much like Ravel’s Bolero, with each passing kilometer. This Guba excursion promises an ever-increasing sense of satisfaction, the burst of positive emotions and memories and the unforgettable journey, as the landscape unfolds to reveal the majestic Khinalig heritage and the rich history of Azerbaijan.

Imagine a place where history stretches back thousands of years and the landscapes look like another planet.
Welcome to Gobustan — one of Azerbaijan’s most remarkable destinations. Here, ancient rock carvings stand alongside famous mud volcanoes, while every stone tells a story from the distant past.
This is a journey through time, offering a glimpse into the lives of people who inhabited these lands long before the modern world existed.

Join our Gobustan & Absheron tour and discover some of Azerbaijan’s most extraordinary historical and natural wonders.

May 28 reminds us that Azerbaijan didn’t just become independent. It made history.

Here, the earth literally “breathes” as cold mud slowly erupts to the surface, creating landscapes that look like another planet.
Azerbaijan is considered the world capital of mud volcanoes - nearly half of all mud volcanoes on Earth are located here.
